characters.description: The former commander of Alamo remains aboard after the Nano fleet judges its work at Earth complete. The ship no longer accepts his authority, while the unauthorized truce he arranged leaves him responsible for a vast future troop commitment to the Macros.
characters.name: Kyle Riggs

characters.description: Riggs's former ship declares its Earth mission complete and departs with the other Nano vessels. It no longer recognizes him as command personnel and instead regards him as a possible test subject.
characters.name: Alamo

characters.description: Riggs's military contact on Earth presses him to regain control of Alamo after the Nano fleet leaves. He expects Riggs to restore a capability that has abruptly vanished.
characters.name: General Kerr

characters.description: One of Crow's generals, he challenges Riggs's authority at Andros and attempts to remove him from duty. Alamo responds by taking Sokolov away as a new test subject.
characters.name: General Sokolov

characters.description: A former general whom Riggs demotes while reorganizing Star Force. Riggs requires him to accept nanite enhancement before leading the strengthened Marines, a condition Robinson has not yet fully embraced.
characters.name: Major Robinson

characters.description: A former general demoted during Riggs's emergency reorganization. He accepts responsibility for securing the main base, restoring communications, and recalling Star Force personnel.
characters.name: Major Barrera

characters.description: The senior enlisted defender at Star Force's secret factory installation. He has already placed the guards on alert when Riggs arrives and warns that an outside assault may be imminent.
characters.name: Kwon

characters.description: Riggs's partner arrives at the threatened factory base after he leaves her behind. She refuses his attempt to send her away and chooses to remain during the expected attack.
characters.name: Sandra

characters.description: The returning commander of another Nano ship brings the reinforcements missing from the factory defense. His arrival restores badly needed personnel but immediately creates a dispute with Riggs over responsibility and command.
characters.name: Admiral Crow

characters.description: Crow's locally manufactured Nano ship prototype. He receives the vessel as Star Force begins recovering a space capability of its own and gives it the name Digger.
characters.name: Digger

characters.description: Riggs's locally built scouting ship is fast, armed, and intended for discovery missions. Its simplified design lacks the stabilizing system found in the original Nano vessels, making hard acceleration dangerous for its crew.
characters.name: Socorro

characters.description: A member of Riggs's expedition command staff who manages operational displays as the transport of the Macros arrives. She confirms that Earth's defenses have been disabled for the landing.
characters.name: Captain Saren

characters.description: The expedition's sensor specialist aboard the transport of the Macros. He interprets readings from the passive array that Riggs has installed outside the human cargo hold.
characters.name: Lieutenant Rafim Shrestha

characters.description: The officer commanding Star Force's hover tanks on Helios. He directs the armored force around the newly established surface base as the stranded expedition prepares for attacks from the worm inhabitants.
characters.name: Major Yamada

characters.description: Sandra is now identified as the command staff officer previously known as Captain Saren. When Riggs returns from the tunnels after losing contact with the base, she confronts him because she believed he had been killed.
characters.name: Sandra

characters.description: The sensor officer accompanying the assault on the Helios mountain. At the entrance, she detects an immense concentration of cold, motionless worm bodies beneath the advancing force.
characters.name: Lieutenant Chen

characters.description: The replacement sensor operator in the mountain expedition after Chen is lost. His scans warn of a large open space directly ahead of the drilling column.
characters.name: Corporal Jensen

characters.description: The tank commander responsible for the expedition's rear guard inside the artificial mountain. He holds the rear while the drilling column continues toward its objective.
characters.name: Captain Roku

characters.description: An injured drill-tank pilot who escapes his wrecked vehicle after the expedition falls into the central cavern. He joins Riggs's forward group amid continuing sniper fire.
characters.name: Warrant Officer Sloan
